en: Why would anyone do that to themselves?
What if I told you that I could make a turkey burger that tastes better than any other burger you've ever had?
ko: 내가 만든 칠면조 버거가 네가 먹어본 어떤 버거보다 맛있다고 하면 어쩔래?

en: Challenge accepted. Cook off later today in the courtyard.
If I win, hamburgers remain in the commissary. What do I get if I win?
The rarest jewel of all. Victory over me, Ron Swanson.
Who the hell is Forb? I don't know. I couldn't really hear him. It sounded like his name was Forb.
You get his number? No. Good girl.
Hey, I'm just going to pop over to Grain and Simple to get the very best ingredients for my burger. Do you want to come?
ko: 나는 최고의 재료를 사러 Grain and Simple에 잠깐 다녀올 거야.

en: What is Grain and Simple? It's a health food store.
ko: Grain and Simple이 뭐냐면, 건강식품 가게야.

en: Pawnee doesn't have a health food store. No, but Snerling does and it's only a 40 minute drive.
What are you doing, Andy? I'm getting healthier snacks for the shoeshine stand.
Chris is a food genius. Did you know that the food you eat becomes energy?
ko: 네가 먹는 음식이 에너지가 된다는 거 알고 있었어? 응.
